summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. No GitHub mutations are planned because instant close, low-signal close, fix PRs, and merge are disabled for this job. The five seed PRs remain open for maintainer/author handling, and the two hydrated security-sensitive context PRs are routed to central security triage only.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive context ref must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling; this does not block unrelated inventory classifications.
